description: Discussion on the evolving landscape of crypto in America, focusing on the competition between New York and San Francisco as leading hubs for blockchain development.
topic_summary: Exploration of the shift in crypto development from discomfort in the U.S. to New York emerging as a central hub for crypto innovation [t=11:76]. The speaker highlights the debate between New York and San Francisco, emphasizing the advantages of New York for crypto builders [t=40:39].
